lens_disposition.reason: The promoted lens is real: all five representatives spend dominant Finalize (merkle+seal) wall time in deferred MARF trie node hashing, and the emitted target reduces commit-bucket seal work directly.

global_materiality_note: This is a broad commit-path target: calculate_node_hashes appears in 100% of sampled blocks with 677524 calls and 20.65s exclusive wall. It should benefit any workload that seals MARF blocks with deferred hashing, not just the five outlier representatives.

targets.evidence: The run-wide profile ranks blockstack_lib::chainstate::stacks::index::storage::TrieRAM::calculate_node_hashes at 677524 calls, 58.811s summed inclusive wall and 20.654s exclusive wall, in 100% of 9000 sampled blocks. Each representative block follows Segment: Finalize (merkle+seal) -> mine_nakamoto_block -> seal -> seal_trie -> MarfTransaction::seal -> calculate_node_hashes. Representative finalize/calculate-node-hash timings: 0xc613f8cb finalize 111.389ms with top recursive calculate_node_hashes 93.095ms; 0xa636ba8a 99.195ms / 87.897ms; 0x1d89e048 99.055ms / 85.749ms; 0x41a2093c 103.692ms / 84.797ms; 0xe93cf098 73.341ms / 59.166ms. Code shows inner_seal_marf() in storage.rs calls calculate_node_hashes(storage_tx, 0), and calculate_node_hashes() immediately does self.get_nodetype(...)? .to_owned(), cloning the full TrieNodeType before writing consensus bytes and recursively hashing children. That clone is paid for every recursive node during the commit-bucket seal and is not a bucket anchor or non-target wrapper. The fix moves commit_time only; it does not change tx execution latency or any binding Clarity cost axis.
targets.proposed_change: Refactor TrieRAM::calculate_node_hashes so it does not clone the entire TrieNodeType on every recursive visit. Add a helper on TrieNodeType/node.rs that, while the node is borrowed, writes the exact same consensus bytes into the TrieHasher and copies only the child TriePtr slice needed for recursion into a lightweight scratch buffer (for example SmallVec/ArrayVec for Node4/Node16 and a boxed Vec only for Node48/Node256). Drop the node borrow before descending recursively, then iterate the copied TriePtr entries to append child hashes/backptr hashes and update deferred child node hashes. Keep the byte order identical to current write_consensus_bytes()+child-hash order, and preserve the Deferred/All mode write_node_hash behavior.
targets.verification_plan: Do not accept a root-hash change. Add or extend MARF tests that compare Immediate, Deferred, and All hash modes over node4/node16/node48/node256 tries, including backptr-heavy blocks. Run the existing chainstate MARF/trie tests and a targeted block replay on the five listed blocks, checking both end-to-end block success and that calculate_node_hashes exclusive wall falls without increasing commit flush spans enough to erase the win.

verification_replay.rationale: block-context MARF seal hotspot; five representatives where calculate_node_hashes dominates Finalize (merkle+seal).
